title: Tahir b. al-Husayn Named Dhu al-Yaminayn
description: In this year, Tahir b. al-I;iusayn was given the name Dhu al-Yaminayn ("He Who Has Two Right Hands "). The report of the reason why he was thus named has already been given;335 now the person who gave him that name will be mentioned 3 36 18301 It is mentioned that after Tahir had defeated the army of All

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
